headline: Hozpitality Group Hosts High-Impact Hospitality Leaders Networking Event in Los Angeles with Strong Industry Turnout
summary: Hozpitality Group successfully hosted its GM/HR/Sales Leaders Networking Event on April 2, 2026, in Los Angeles, bringing together an influential group of hospitality professionals and industry leaders from across Southern California.
